description: You are a BIM Coordinator processing the FZK-Haus architectural model for the 'Stage 4 Technical Design' milestone. The model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). The structural team has signed off on the floor slabs, while the facade consultant has reviewed the windows but placed them on hold due to missing information. Create two IfcApproval entities: one with Status 'APPROVED' (e.g., 'Structural Sign-off') and one with Status 'PENDING' or 'REJECTED' (e.g., 'Facade Review'). Assign the 'APPROVED' approval to all IfcSlab elements and the 'PENDING' or 'REJECTED' approval to all IfcWindow elements. Save the modified project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_element_approvals.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=70. Must save file and partially map approvals to elements to pass.
